name: Baked Shrimp Creole
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------------SHRIMP SAUCE--------------------------------
1. Combine 1 cup chili sauce, 1/4 cup pickle relish, 1/2 teaspoon mustard,
1 tablespoon lemon juice, and 1 cup mayonnaise in a bowl.
2. Add 1 hard-cooked egg, chopped, and 1/2 teaspoon grated onion to the
mixture; stir until well combined.
3. Place shrimp in a well-oiled shallow baking pan so they do not touch;
sprinkle with salt and pepper.
4. Turn the shrimp once with a broad spatula to coat both sides evenly.
5. Bake at 450°F for 6 to 8 minutes. Serve with baked shrimp sauce or
your favorite sauce.
SHRIMP SAUCE
1. Combine all ingredients; chill until ready to serve.
2. Serve over baked or broiled shrimp.
